content.speakerText: We’re doing a weekend road trip to the mountains—want to come? It’s super cheap!
content.speakerTextCn: 我们周末去山里自驾游，一起来？超便宜的！
expectedAnswers: That sounds awesome! I’d love to join, but I’m tight on cash this month. Can I tag along next time?
I’ve been dying to hit the mountains! Unfortunately, my budget’s all gone until payday. Let me know when you plan again!
Road trips are my favorite! But I’m broke right now—I’ll be your #1 travel buddy next time!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确婉拒当前邀请，但表达兴趣
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的口语表达（如 tight on cash, broke）
表达自然度：语气友好，符合朋友间对话习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 budget / cash / next time 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Seriously? You always have an excuse!
content.speakerTextCn: 真的吗？你每次都找借口！
expectedAnswers: I know, I’m the worst travel partner lately. But I’m building up my savings for next trip—I promise I’ll be the one bringing the snacks!
Haha, fair! I’ve been extra careful with money this year. But I’ll definitely be there next time—with good vibes and good snacks!
Yeah, I’ve been saying no a lot. But I’m really looking forward to joining you soon—I just need a little more time to save up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：承认对方感受，化解情绪，不反驳
语言准确性：使用自嘲（I’m the worst）和承诺（I’ll be there）结构
表达自然度：语气轻松幽默，符合朋友间调侃语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 saving / next time / snacks / vibes 等关键词

content.speakerText: I heard you’re not going on the hiking trip again? Don’t you ever want to get out?
content.speakerTextCn: 我听说你又不去徒步旅行了？你难道从不想出去走走吗？
expectedAnswers: I totally want to! I just need to save up first—next time I’m bringing the best snacks and the most energy!
You’re right, I’ve been staying in too much. I’m working on a travel fund—next trip, I’m in for sure!
I miss adventures so much! Right now, I’m being smart with money, but I’m already planning the next hike with you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应对方质疑，不防御，表达真实愿望
语言准确性：使用正确时态和口语化表达（saving up, I’m in for sure）
表达自然度：语气真诚、积极，避免消极或敷衍
关键词覆盖：使用了 save up / next trip / snacks / adventures 等场景关键词
